# SignaKit Docs

SignaKit is a developer platform for feature flags, A/B testing, and experimentation.

## SignaKit Flags

### Getting Started
- [Quickstart](https://docs.signakit.com/flags/quickstart)

### SDKs
- [Node.js SDK (@signakit/flags-node)](https://docs.signakit.com/flags/sdks/node)
- [Browser SDK (@signakit/flags-browser)](https://docs.signakit.com/flags/sdks/browser)
- [React SDK (@signakit/flags-react)](https://docs.signakit.com/flags/sdks/react)
- [React Native SDK (@signakit/flags-react-native)](https://docs.signakit.com/flags/sdks/react-native)
- [Flutter SDK (signakit_flags)](https://docs.signakit.com/flags/sdks/flutter)
- [Python SDK (signakit-flags)](https://docs.signakit.com/flags/sdks/python)
- [Go SDK (flags-golang)](https://docs.signakit.com/flags/sdks/go)
- [Java SDK (flags-java)](https://docs.signakit.com/flags/sdks/java)
- [PHP SDK (signakit/flags-php)](https://docs.signakit.com/flags/sdks/php)
- [Laravel SDK (signakit/flags-laravel)](https://docs.signakit.com/flags/sdks/laravel)

### Concepts
- [Feature Flags](https://docs.signakit.com/flags/concepts/feature-flags)
- [Targeted Delivery](https://docs.signakit.com/flags/concepts/targeted-delivery)
- [A/B Testing](https://docs.signakit.com/flags/concepts/ab-testing)
- [Multi-Armed Bandit](https://docs.signakit.com/flags/concepts/multi-armed-bandit)
- [Audiences](https://docs.signakit.com/flags/concepts/audiences)
- [Events & Metrics](https://docs.signakit.com/flags/concepts/events-and-metrics)
- [Environments](https://docs.signakit.com/flags/concepts/environments)
- [SDK Architecture](https://docs.signakit.com/flags/concepts/sdk-architecture)

### Framework Guides
- [Next.js App Router](https://docs.signakit.com/flags/guides/nextjs-app-router)
- [Next.js Pages Router](https://docs.signakit.com/flags/guides/nextjs-pages-router)
- [Next.js Middleware](https://docs.signakit.com/flags/guides/nextjs-middleware)
- [Remix](https://docs.signakit.com/flags/guides/remix)
- [Express](https://docs.signakit.com/flags/guides/express)
- [Fastify](https://docs.signakit.com/flags/guides/fastify)
- [NestJS](https://docs.signakit.com/flags/guides/nestjs)
- [React SPA](https://docs.signakit.com/flags/guides/react-spa)
- [React Native / Expo](https://docs.signakit.com/flags/guides/react-native-expo)
- [Flutter](https://docs.signakit.com/flags/guides/flutter-mobile)
- [Laravel](https://docs.signakit.com/flags/guides/laravel-guide)
- [Symfony](https://docs.signakit.com/flags/guides/symfony)
- [WordPress](https://docs.signakit.com/flags/guides/wordpress)

### Reference
- [Changelog](https://docs.signakit.com/flags/changelog)

## SignaKit Events
- [Overview (coming soon)](https://docs.signakit.com/events)
